questions.question: In `inventory/ajax_load.php`, what happens when the `Authorization` header is absent from the request?

options.text: The request is rejected with a 401 status code
`definer.php` is loaded and `AuthMiddleware` handles authentication
`config.php` is included, providing session-based authentication with `$db`, `$current_user`, and `$stockist` via globals
The request proceeds without any authentication

questions.question: What is the data type and length of the `inv_id` primary key in the `bas_inventory` table?

options.text: `VARCHAR(14)` ‚Äî variable length up to 14 characters
`CHAR(12)` ‚Äî fixed 12-character string
`INT` ‚Äî auto-incrementing integer
`VARCHAR(24)` ‚Äî variable length matching status field

questions.question: In the `create_ctn` action, what happens to the `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE` records after a carton is created?

options.text: The state records are updated with the new carton ID
The state records are archived to a history table
All `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE` records for the current user are deleted
The state records remain unchanged for future reference

questions.question: When the `update_uid` action processes a Watch from `qc_pending` status with no QC issues, what is the resulting `inv_status`?

options.text: `qc_verified` ‚Äî Watches follow the same path as all other categories
`qc_cooling` ‚Äî Watches enter a cooling period before verification
`qc_pending` ‚Äî status remains unchanged until manual verification
`components_requested` ‚Äî Watches always require component checks

questions.question: In `Stockist::new_grn_inbound()`, how is the `inv_id` sequence formatted for international lots (lot prefix `SF`)?

options.text: `{lot_number}` + 4-digit zero-padded sequence
`{lot_number}` + 6-digit zero-padded sequence
`INV` + 9-digit zero-padded auto-increment
`{grn_id}` + `{item_id}` + 4-digit sequence

questions.question: What does the `before_update_inventory` trigger do when `inv_status` changes to a terminal value like `sales` or `outbound`?

options.text: Decrements the `committed_stock` on `TBL_PRODUCTS_MASTER`
Inserts a log entry into `TBL_INVENTORY_LOG`
Nulls `box_id`, `ctn_id`, `expectedLocation`, `currentLocation`, `inv_batch` and resets `inv_failed_count` to 0
Deletes the inventory row from `bas_inventory`

questions.question: In the `move_to_box` action, which movement direction is explicitly blocked with an error message?

options.text: UID ‚Üí BOX
BOX ‚Üí CTN
UID ‚Üí CTN (directly ‚Äî "Product cannot be moved directly to Cartoon")
UID ‚Üí Location

questions.question: What are the three possible values of the `isImperfect` field on `bas_inventory` and what does each represent?

options.text: `0` = normal, `1` = damaged, `2` = discarded
`0` = normal, `1` = imperfect (approved), `2` = imperfect_request (pending approval)
`0` = unchecked, `1` = passed, `2` = failed
`0` = perfect, `1` = repairable, `2` = unrepairable

questions.question: In `Stockist::get_expected_location_by_status()`, what location prefix pattern is used for the `inbound` status?

options.text: `STKROM%`
`QCAREA%`
`GODOWN%`
`PRAREA%`

questions.question: When `update_grn_status` determines that all GRN item statuses are complete (none are NULL or 'receiving'), what additional reset operation does it perform?

options.text: Deletes the GRN record from `TBL_PURCHASE_GRN`
Updates `TBL_PURCHASE_ORDER` status to 'received'
Resets `TBL_INVENTORY_LOCATIONS` availability to 20000 and status to 0
Creates a new task for inventory reconciliation

questions.question: In `Stockist::update_inventory_status()`, what happens specifically when the target status is `qc_verified`?

options.text: The item's `isImperfect` flag is set to '1'
`committed_stock` on `TBL_PRODUCTS_MASTER` is decremented, then `update_stock_on_mps()` is called to sync marketplaces
The item is immediately assigned to a picklist
A notification is sent to the warehouse manager

questions.question: The `moveInventory()` function in `inventory/functions.php` enforces sequential movement within a batch/box. What validation does it perform on the `inv_id` parameter?

options.text: Checks that `inv_id` starts with a valid lot prefix
Validates that `inv_id` is exactly 12 characters long
Verifies that `inv_id` exists in `TBL_INVENTORY_ASSIGNED`
Confirms that `inv_id` matches the current user's assigned batch

questions.question: How does the `alter_inventory` action handle an attempt to change a Prototype (PT prefix) SKU to a normal SKU?

options.text: The alteration is always allowed without restrictions
The alteration is blocked unless the reason is "Change Prototype SKU To Upgraded SKU"
The alteration automatically sets the item to `qc_failed` status
The alteration is redirected to the admin module for approval

questions.question: In the `vendor_return` action, what two conditions must be met before an inventory item can be returned to a vendor?

options.text: Item must be `qc_verified` status and have `isImperfect='1'`
Item must have `is_ams_inv=1` (AMS inventory) and the PO party_id must match the submitted vendor
Item must be in a sealed box and have completed QC
Item must have `inv_failed_count > 0` and be assigned to the vendor batch

questions.question: What does `Stockist::add_inventory_log()` do specially when the `$log_type` parameter is `'sales_return'`?

options.text: It only inserts the log entry, with no side effects
It sends a Slack notification to the sales team
It sets `expectedLocation='RETURN_00001'`, `inv_batch=today`, `ctn_id='2002'`, and deactivates warranty registrations in `TBL_REGISTERED_WARRANTY`
It triggers the `before_update_inventory` trigger to null tracking fields

questions.question: In the `audit_uid` action, what happens when a scanned UID has `inv_status` of `'sales'` or `'outbound'`?

options.text: The audit tag is applied normally and logged
The item is skipped ‚Äî placed in a separate bucket by status name without updating audit tags
An error is returned and the scan is rejected entirely
The item's status is automatically changed to `qc_pending` for re-verification

questions.question: The `before_update_bas_inventory` trigger fires when which column changes on `bas_inventory`?

options.text: `inv_status` ‚Äî sets currentLocation to NULL
`expectedLocation` ‚Äî clears `currentLocation` to NULL (forcing re-confirmation of physical location)
`box_id` ‚Äî clears `ctn_id` to cascade container changes
`item_id` ‚Äî prevents SKU changes on existing inventory

questions.question: In the DRR-based auto-assignment Phase 2 of `get_expected_location_by_status()`, how are high-DRR items (daily run rate >= 5) treated?

options.text: They are assigned to the highest shelves for security
They are assigned to overflow/garden locations
They are assigned to the lowest shelves (highest height score) for easier physical access
They are distributed evenly across all shelf heights

questions.question: What is the special carton ID `3002` used for in the `move_to_location` action?

options.text: Items assigned to photography batches
Items with status `qc_pending` awaiting QC
Items being moved to `FAILED_` or `GDNFLD_` locations (repairable/garden-failed areas)
Items in the inbound godown awaiting tagging

questions.question: In the `TBL_INVENTORY_STATE` table, the `boxId` column has a UNIQUE constraint. What are the four distinct usage modes of this table across the `ajax_load.php` actions?

options.text: QC tracking, location tracking, batch tracking, picklist tracking
Box creation state (boxId+invId+userId), QC carton processing (ctnId+category+count+userId), location movement tracking (locationId+count+userId), item-wise movement state (invId+category+jsonData)
Inbound state, outbound state, audit state, transfer state
User session state, product state, order state, shipment state
